simple_types.name: OCSP_Certificate_Revocation_Reasons
simple_types.code:
type OCSP_Certificate_Revocation_Reasons is
		(Not_Revoked, Unspecified, Key_Compromise, CA_Compromise,
		Affiliation_Changed, Superseded, Cessation_of_Operation,
		Certificate_Hold, Remove_From_Cit…
		AA_Compromise);

simple_types.name: OCSP_Response_Statuses

record_types.name: Certificate_Info
record_types.code:
type Certificate_Info is record
		-- The certif
		-- hexadecima
		-- The hash i
		-- Example
		-- "SHA256:66
		-- The hash s
		--     h="$(o
		--     printf
		Hash : Unbounded_String;
		-- The certif
		Issuer, Subject : Unbounded_String;
		-- The NotBef
		-- the certif
		Not_Before, Not_After : Time;
	end record;

fields.name: Hash
fields.description: The certificate issuer and subject, respectively

fields.name: Issuer
fields.description:
The NotBefore and NotAfter times specifying the validity period of
the certificate.

fields.name: Subject
fields.description:
The NotBefore and NotAfter times specifying the validity period of
the certificate.

record_types.name: Connection_Info

fields.name: TLS_Version
fields.description: The cipher suite negotiated with the peer

fields.name: Cipher
fields.description:
The strength, in bits, of the symmetric cipher negotiated with the
peer

fields.name: Cipher_Strength
fields.description:
The ALPN protocol selected for use with the peer.
ALPN = Null_Unbounded_String if no ALPN protocol was selected.

record_types.name: OCSP_Info

fields.name: OCSP_URL
fields.description: The OCSP response status per RFC 6960 Â§ 2.3

fields.name: Response_Status
fields.description: The OCSP certificate status per RFC 6960 Â§ 2.2

fields.name: Certificate_Status
fields.description: The OCSP certificate revocation reason per RFC 6960 Â§ 5.3.1

fields.name: Revocation_Reason
fields.description: The time the certificate was revoked in OCSP

fields.name: Revocation_Time
fields.description: The time of the most recent and next OCSP update

tagged_types.name: Context
tagged_types.code: type Context is abstract limited new Root_Stream_Type with private;
